## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Knapsack and GrowthX to discuss email campaign performance, content strategy, and website updates.](https://fathom.video/share/GUPeUKSYPxNBegyUQN8xh6c1uRAj782e?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Email campaign showing 18% positive reply rate; focus shifting to driving further engagement](https://fathom.video/share/GUPeUKSYPxNBegyUQN8xh6c1uRAj782e?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
  - [Content strategy pivoting to backlink-focused approach, targeting financial service software companies](https://fathom.video/share/GUPeUKSYPxNBegyUQN8xh6c1uRAj782e?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [New website launch imminent; team to review for functionality and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/GUPeUKSYPxNBegyUQN8xh6c1uRAj782e?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
  - [Decision to create standardized demo video for broader outreach efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/GUPeUKSYPxNBegyUQN8xh6c1uRAj782e?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)

## Topics

### Email Campaign Performance and Strategy

  - [18% positive reply rate, considered decent for this type of campaign](https://fathom.video/share/GUPeUKSYPxNBegyUQN8xh6c1uRAj782e?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
  - [Current focus: sending 5-minute Loom demo videos upon positive response](https://fathom.video/share/GUPeUKSYPxNBegyUQN8xh6c1uRAj782e?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [New strategy: Push for in-person calls after demo video sent](https://fathom.video/share/GUPeUKSYPxNBegyUQN8xh6c1uRAj782e?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [Adding Calendly link to follow-up emails to facilitate scheduling](https://fathom.video/share/GUPeUKSYPxNBegyUQN8xh6c1uRAj782e?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
  - [Need to increase lead volume through additional list building](https://fathom.video/share/GUPeUKSYPxNBegyUQN8xh6c1uRAj782e?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)

### Content Strategy and SEO

  - [Current stats: \~3,000 impressions total, 1,300/day; 18-20 clicks/day (769 total)](https://fathom.video/share/GUPeUKSYPxNBegyUQN8xh6c1uRAj782e?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [154 organic keywords ranking, 40 in top 10](https://fathom.video/share/GUPeUKSYPxNBegyUQN8xh6c1uRAj782e?tab=summary&timestamp=905.0)
  - [Content refresh showed positive impact on clicks and impressions](https://fathom.video/share/GUPeUKSYPxNBegyUQN8xh6c1uRAj782e?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [New focus: Creating articles about financial service software tools (30-40 planned)](https://fathom.video/share/GUPeUKSYPxNBegyUQN8xh6c1uRAj782e?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Goal: Improve domain authority through backlinks from featured companies](https://fathom.video/share/GUPeUKSYPxNBegyUQN8xh6c1uRAj782e?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)

### Website Updates and Feedback

  - [New website launch planned for end of week/early next week](https://fathom.video/share/GUPeUKSYPxNBegyUQN8xh6c1uRAj782e?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
  - ['Learn' section added, including Learning Center with articles](https://fathom.video/share/GUPeUKSYPxNBegyUQN8xh6c1uRAj782e?tab=summary&timestamp=1426.0)
  - [Team to review for functionality, ensure Google Tag Manager and HubSpot integration](https://fathom.video/share/GUPeUKSYPxNBegyUQN8xh6c1uRAj782e?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Mark requesting team to use Knapsack app and provide testimonial](https://fathom.video/share/GUPeUKSYPxNBegyUQN8xh6c1uRAj782e?tab=summary&timestamp=1468.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Pierre to enroll demo recipients into follow-up sequence, add Calendly link](https://fathom.video/share/GUPeUKSYPxNBegyUQN8xh6c1uRAj782e?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Muhammad to focus on backlink strategy, creating articles on financial service software companies](https://fathom.video/share/GUPeUKSYPxNBegyUQN8xh6c1uRAj782e?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Team to review new website for functionality and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/GUPeUKSYPxNBegyUQN8xh6c1uRAj782e?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Mark to create standardized demo video (likely using Loom) for broader outreach](https://fathom.video/share/GUPeUKSYPxNBegyUQN8xh6c1uRAj782e?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
  - [Jimmy and Mark to have follow-up discussion later today](https://fathom.video/share/GUPeUKSYPxNBegyUQN8xh6c1uRAj782e?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)
